spans: particularly when sleeping on the affected side

subjective.fact: The patient's left shoulder pain is alleviated with Tylenol.

subjective.fact: The patient denies any direct trauma to the shoulder.

I prescribed Tylenol

spans: every 6-8 hours

subjective.fact: The patient's Tylenol is prescribed for pain.

assessment.fact: The patient has rotator cuff tendinopathy.
